title: Safety Scanner
commit_message: feat: add 10D safety scanner
spec: Build the 10D safety scanner from the Jarvis Quant master roadmap. Add or harden deterministic scans that block live trading enablement, broker order submission, API key exposure, secret handling, unsafe labels, and bypassed tests. The scanner must be usable from PowerShell on PC and must integrate with checkpoint automation. Include tests. Do not touch secrets, .env, broker credentials, live-trading toggles, or order execution paths except to scan/block unsafe patterns.

title: Dual Engine Folder Structure
commit_message: feat: add dual engine folder structure
spec: Build the 11A dual-engine folder structure for Wealth and Moonshot engines. Keep deterministic strategy code separate from non-deterministic analyst/research outputs. Include README or docs explaining boundaries. Include tests or structure checks. Do not enable live trading or broker orders.

title: Wealth Moonshot Risk Policies
commit_message: feat: add wealth and moonshot risk policies
spec: Build 11B risk policy definitions for Wealth and Moonshot engines. Policies must be research-only and paper-only. Include max loss, drawdown, position sizing, promotion gates, and stop conditions. Include tests. No live trading or broker order routing.

title: Strategy Cards
commit_message: feat: add strategy cards
spec: Build 11C strategy cards for deterministic and non-deterministic strategy candidates. Cards should include hypothesis, universe, timeframe, signals, risk rules, validation requirements, and promotion criteria. Include tests or schema validation. Research-only safety boundary: do not enable live trading, do not submit broker orders, do not expose secrets, and do not weaken safety gates.

title: Experiment Registry
commit_message: feat: add experiment registry
spec: Build 11D experiment registry for backtests, paper drills, strategy evaluations, and promotion history. Include append-only records, schema validation, and tests. No secrets or broker execution. Research-only safety boundary: do not enable live trading, do not submit broker orders, do not expose secrets, and do not weaken safety gates.

title: Promotion Gate Evaluator
commit_message: feat: add promotion gate evaluator
spec: Build 11E promotion gate evaluator. It should decide whether a strategy remains blocked, research-only, paper-only, or eligible for human review. It must never emit BUY-NOW, SELL-NOW, EXECUTE-TRADE, or AUTO-TRADE. Include tests.

title: Wealth Mean Reversion Lab
commit_message: feat: add wealth mean reversion lab
spec: Build 12A Wealth mean-reversion research lab. Research-only. Include signal definitions, backtest hooks, report outputs, and tests. No live trading.

title: Wealth Backtester
commit_message: feat: add wealth backtester
spec: Build 12B Wealth backtester with deterministic, reproducible outputs. Include cost hooks, benchmark comparisons, train/test separation, and tests. Research-only safety boundary: do not enable live trading, do not submit broker orders, do not expose secrets, and do not weaken safety gates.

title: Wealth Cost Slippage Model
commit_message: feat: add wealth cost and slippage model
spec: Build 12C cost and slippage model for Wealth backtests. Include configurable assumptions, default conservative settings, and tests. Research-only safety boundary: do not enable live trading, do not submit broker orders, do not expose secrets, and do not weaken safety gates.

title: Wealth Regime Filters
commit_message: feat: add wealth regime filters
spec: Build 12D regime filters for Wealth strategies. Include volatility, trend, liquidity, and risk-off filters. Include tests. Research-only safety boundary: do not enable live trading, do not submit broker orders, do not expose secrets, and do not weaken safety gates.

title: Moonshot Simulator
commit_message: feat: add moonshot simulator
spec: Build 13A Moonshot simulator for high-risk research scenarios. Research-only. Include risk caps, failure modes, reports, and tests.

title: Moonshot Options Research
commit_message: feat: add moonshot options research
spec: Build 13B Moonshot options research module. Research-only. Include option thesis structure, Greeks-aware risk notes, expiration handling, and tests. No order execution.

title: Moonshot Crypto Risk Guard
commit_message: feat: add moonshot crypto risk guard
spec: Build 13C crypto risk guard. Research-only. Include drawdown caps, liquidity warnings, volatility filters, and tests. No exchange credentials or live orders.

title: Moonshot LEAPS Research Engine
commit_message: feat: add moonshot LEAPS research engine
spec: Build 13D LEAPS research engine. Research-only. Include thesis, catalyst, expiration, delta, liquidity, risk, and monitoring fields. Include tests.

title: Options Monitor Dashboard
commit_message: feat: add options monitor dashboard
spec: Build 13E options monitor dashboard/report generator. Research-only. Include static report outputs and tests. No broker integration.

title: Paper LEAPS Portfolio
commit_message: feat: add paper LEAPS portfolio
spec: Build 13F paper LEAPS portfolio tracker. Paper-only. Include simulated fills, thesis status, PnL tracking, and tests. No live broker orders. Research-only safety boundary: do not enable live trading, do not submit broker orders, do not expose secrets, and do not weaken safety gates.

title: Claude OpenAI Dual Agent Review
commit_message: feat: add dual agent review workflow
spec: Build 13G dual-agent review workflow. It should support Claude/Codex/OpenAI review outputs for research and code safety. Include tests. Do not weaken safety gates.

title: Champion Challenger
commit_message: feat: add champion challenger evaluator
spec: Build 14A Champion/Challenger evaluator from the Jarvis Quant master roadmap. It should compare candidate research strategies against incumbent strategy cards using deterministic metrics, promotion-gate rules, out-of-sample performance summaries, risk-policy compatibility, and human-review-required decisions. Outputs must remain research-only, monitor-only, paper-only, and blocked-by-safety-gate when appropriate. Include tests. Do not enable live trading, broker routing, broker order submission, secrets, API keys, .env reads/writes, or unsafe trade instructions.

title: Weekly Review
commit_message: feat: add weekly review workflow
spec: Build 14B Weekly Review workflow from the Jarvis Quant master roadmap. It should summarize weekly research results across Wealth and Moonshot engines, experiments, promotion gates, champion/challenger outcomes, safety scanner findings, blocked decisions, and next-review actions. It must produce deterministic JSON and Markdown report outputs suitable for human review. Include tests. Do not enable live trading, broker routing, broker order submission, secrets, API keys, .env reads/writes, or unsafe trade instructions.

The workflow must remain research-only, monitor-only, paper-only, human-review-required, and LIVE TRADING: DISABLED. It must not use secrets, credential files, broker routing, broker calls, or order execution. Include tests.

It should clearly label allowed human-review workflows and blocked workflows. The workflow must remain research-only, monitor-only, paper-only, human-review-required, and LIVE TRADING: DISABLED. It must not use secrets, credential files, broker routing, broker calls, or order execution. Include tests.

It must list missing artifacts, skipped steps, stale reports, blocked workflows, failed safety findings, and required human-review actions. It must remain research-only, monitor-only, paper-only, human-review-required, blocked-by-safety-gate, and LIVE TRADING: DISABLED. It must not use secrets, credential files, broker routing, broker calls, live trading, or order execution. Include tests.

title: Research Artifact Retention Policy
commit_message: feat: add research artifact retention policy
spec: Build 20B Research Artifact Retention Policy from the Jarvis Quant master roadmap. It should generate deterministic JSON and Markdown retention-policy reports for generated research artifacts and report directories. It should classify artifacts as keep, review, archive_candidate, or blocked_delete, based on report type, date, safety label, missing status, and whether the artifact is referenced by release bundles, audit summaries, dashboards, evidence packs, journals, or runbooks. It must not delete files automatically. It may only produce a reviewable policy and dry-run manifest. It must remain research-only, monitor-only, paper-only, human-review-required, blocked-by-safety-gate, and LIVE TRADING: DISABLED. It must not use secrets, credential files, broker routing, broker calls, live trading, or order execution. Include tests.

It should list required human-review items, missing artifacts, stale artifacts, skipped steps, blocked workflows, safety findings, retention review items, and next operator actions. It must only create review items and must never create trade instructions, execution instructions, broker actions, or live-trading approvals. It must remain research-only, monitor-only, paper-only, human-review-required, blocked-by-safety-gate, and LIVE TRADING: DISABLED. It must not use secrets, credential files, broker routing, broker calls, live trading, or order execution. Include tests.

It should preserve immutable review-item IDs, timestamps, operator note fields, review status, safety labels, and blocked-workflow references. It must explicitly prevent acknowledgments from enabling live trading, broker routing, broker calls, order execution, or automatic actions. It should classify the review cycle as CLOSED_FOR_RECORDS_ONLY, NEEDS_OPERATOR_REVIEW, or BLOCKED_BY_SAFETY_GATE. It must not create trade instructions, broker actions, live-trading approvals, automatic actions, or execution permissions. Required labels: RESEARCH_ONLY, MONITOR_ONLY, PAPER_ONLY, HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED, BLOCKED_BY_SAFETY_GATE, LIVE TRADING: DISABLED. PAPER_ONLY and HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED.

title: HMM Regime Validation and Tuning Experiment Registry

spec: Implement an HMM tuning experiment registry and out-of-sample regime validation harness. Compare tuned HMM configurations against naive baselines. title: Human Review Resolution Ledger
commit_message: feat: add human review resolution ledger
spec: Build BR-21 Human Review Resolution Ledger. Create deterministic JSON and Markdown ledger records that let a human reviewer close unresolved research-review items from BR-17, BR-18, BR-19, and BR-20 without changing trading state. The ledger must record source evidence, review item id, reviewer decision category, rationale, evidence references, unresolved blockers, required follow-up, acceptance criteria, and immutable safety boundaries. Allowed resolution categories are keep_blocked, keep_review_required, keep_paper_only, needs_more_evidence, stale_evidence, and duplicate_review_item. It must remain read-only, offline, deterministic, research-only, monitor-only, paper-only, and human-review-required. It must not load credentials, call data providers, connect to brokers, create broker actions, create order paths, mutate live state, or enable live trading. title: Promotion Gate Evidence Checklist
commit_message: feat: add promotion gate evidence checklist
spec: Build BR-23 Promotion Gate Evidence Checklist. Define deterministic JSON and Markdown checklist records that specify what evidence is required before any paper research idea can advance to a later review stage. The checklist must cover source freshness, provenance, scenario coverage, replay coverage, decision journal completeness, human review resolution, paper outcome tracking, risk policy compliance, stale-data rejection, liquidity rejection, and safety boundaries. It must produce blocked, review-required, or paper-only checklist classifications. It must not authorize live trading, broker actions, order paths, credential loading, data-provider calls, live state mutation, or any external routing. title: Snapshot to Candidate Deterministic Adapter
commit_message: feat: add snapshot to candidate deterministic adapter
spec: Build BR-28 Snapshot-to-Candidate Deterministic Adapter. Consume only a BR-27-reviewed approved offline snapshot and convert its point-in-time records into normalized research-candidate records. Preserve observation timestamps, decision timestamps, source checksum, provenance, strategy version, feature inputs, missing-data flags, stale-data flags, benchmark context, and human-review status. Prevent look-ahead by using only information available at each decision timestamp. Do not optimize parameters or select a strategy using evaluation-period outcomes. It must not load credentials, call providers, connect to brokers, perform broker write operations, create external routing paths, mutate state, or authorize live trading. title: Offline Snapshot Research Replay Evidence Pack
commit_message: feat: add offline snapshot research replay evidence pack
spec: Build BR-29 Offline Snapshot Research Replay Evidence Pack. Replay BR-28 snapshot-derived candidates through frozen deterministic screening, strategy, risk, lifecycle, and paper-only reporting boundaries. Produce gross and net research returns, turnover, exposure, trade count, hit rate, drawdown, Sharpe, Sortino, Calmar, benchmark excess return, fold stability, cost sensitivity, symbol contribution, parameter-neighborhood evidence, unresolved blockers, and required human-review actions where supported by the frozen source data. Reuse existing walk-forward, CPCV, Deflated-Sharpe, benchmark, slippage, robustness, and duplicate-signal infrastructure where appropriate without tuning against the evaluation period. Trade selection must be opportunity-driven: zero candidates may advance when none qualify, and multiple independent candidates may advance when all deterministic data, strategy, liquidity, correlation, portfolio-risk, lifecycle, and safety gates pass. Do not impose a permanent fixed daily trade quota. Aggregate risk budgets, concentration limits, duplicate-signal controls, and operational circuit breakers must remain enforced. Do not claim alpha merely because a report passes. Generate deterministic JSON and Markdown evidence. The phase must remain offline, read-only, fixture-testable, research-only, paper-only, and human-review-required. It must not load credentials, call providers, connect to brokers, perform broker write operations, create external routing paths, mutate state, or authorize live trading. title: Autopilot Staging and Temporary Artifact Hardening
commit_message: fix: harden autopilot staging and temporary artifacts
spec: Build OPS-05 Autopilot Staging and Temporary Artifact Hardening. Audit and patch the persistent autopilot, master-plan autopilot, phase checkpoint, EOF-repair, staging, safety-scan, merge, and temporary-file cleanup workflows patch the persistent autopilot, master-plan autopilot, phase checkpoint, EOF. Prevent partial phase commits such as committing only a script and test while leaving engine, documentation, fixture, and report artifacts outside the commit. Discover changed paths using robust Git porcelain parsing, including staged, unstaged, renamed, deleted, and untracked files. Normalize end-of-file whitespace before diff validation. Pass every intended phase artifact to the safety scanner before committing. Stage only explicit intended phase files and reject unexpected paths. Never delete or clean a path merely because it is under a temporary-looking directory when Git reports that path as tracked. Convert genuine pytest and Python cache outputs into ignored, untracked temporary artifacts where safe, without deleting legitimate fixtures or source evidence. Add regression tests covering partial staging, tracked temporary paths, CRLF/LF normalization, EOF whitespace, safety-scan file discovery, failed merge recovery, and clean branch requirements. Preserve stop-on-failure behavior. Do not introduce credentials, provider calls, broker connectivity, broker writes, external routing, state mutation, or live trading. RESEARCH_ONLY; MONITOR_ONLY; PAPER_ONLY; HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED; BLOCKED_BY_SAFETY_GATE. LIVE TRADING: DISABLED. Include tests and documentation.

title: Jarvis Application Architecture Contract
commit_message: feat: add Jarvis application architecture contract
spec: Build UI-00 Jarvis Application Architecture Contract. Define the production architecture for a real interactive Jarvis desktop application while preserving independent operation through PowerShell on PC, Cline, Python scripts, tests, and automation. Define separate quant-engine, local service/API, event-stream, frontend, and desktop-shell boundaries. Specify canonical read models, command schemas, event schemas, API versioning, WebSocket-style update contracts, authentication boundaries, role permissions, audit records, correlation IDs, idempotency requirements, failure states, reconnect behavior, and read-only versus state-changing commands. Define planned dashboard modules for system health, data status, research, screener, opportunities, analyst theses, market regime, lifecycle, risk gate, portfolio, alerts, models, performance analytics, backtests, paper activity, options, and Moonshot research. Record the futuristic dark holographic blue-and-amber HUD design direction while requiring legible, truthful, accessible status displays. The UI must never store provider or broker credentials, directly access unrestricted execution functions, or become the only way to operate Jarvis. A failed or closed UI must not disable the CLI or quant engine. UI-00 is architecture, schemas, documentation, fixtures, and tests only; it must not create broker connectivity, external routing, order capability, state mutation, or live trading. RESEARCH_ONLY; MONITOR_ONLY; PAPER_ONLY; HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED; BLOCKED_BY_SAFETY_GATE. LIVE TRADING: DISABLED.

title: Read Only Live Market Data Adapter
commit_message: feat: add read only live market data adapter
spec: Build BR-30 Read-Only Live Market Data Adapter. Create a provider-independent market-data interface and an initial tastytrade-compatible read-only adapter that can retrieve or ingest authorized market bars, quotes, option-chain metadata, snapshot metadata, feed identity, provider timestamps, exchange timestamps, acquisition timestamps, schema versions, and quality flags. Normalize received data into the BR-26 snapshot contract and preserve immutable raw and normalized evidence with checksums and provenance. Include fixture and recorded-response modes so every automated test runs without network access or credentials. Default runtime behavior must remain offline and fail closed. Provider access must require a separate explicit read-only runtime configuration outside the repository. Authentication material must use local secret storage and must never be written to source files, reports, logs, fixtures, Git history, or the user interface. The research process must not receive account mutation capabilities or execution methods. Reject stale, malformed, incomplete, unapproved-feed, low-provenance, clock-skewed, duplicate, or unsafe data. Include reconnect-boundary, retry-boundary, rate-limit, duplicate-event, timezone, missing-bar, delayed-feed, sandbox-reset, and feed-mismatch tests. The adapter architecture must remain broker-neutral so future Massive, Databento, ORATS, TradeStation, or IBKR adapters can implement the same canonical contracts without changing strategies. Produce deterministic JSON and Markdown evidence showing whether data is suitable for later shadow research. Do not create broker writes, external execution routing, position mutation, account mutation, or live trading authorization. RESEARCH_ONLY; MONITOR_ONLY; PAPER_ONLY; HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED; BLOCKED_BY_SAFETY_GATE. LIVE TRADING: DISABLED. Include tests and docs.
